core_payload.content:
# CapsuleOS Project

## 1. Role
CapsuleOS Project is the deeper control-plane program for sovereign knowledge, expanding the platform beyond the current implementation stream toward stronger branch intelligence, safer promotion mechanics, richer validator orchestration, and clearer runtime contracts.

## 2. Project Contract
The project focuses on making platform law legible at scale, deepening control-plane visibility across runtime, review, promotion, and archive decisions, and creating calmer contracts between quarry, refinery, workspace, swarm, and repository execution lanes.

## 3. Operational Consequence
Second-brain behavior feels more stable because the substrate beneath it is more deliberate, more governable, and less reliant on scattered folklore.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
CapsuleOS Project supports To Dig Deep by making sovereign memory operate through stronger platform law rather than accidental coordination.

neuro_concentrate.summary: CapsuleOS Project defines the control-plane program that strengthens sovereign knowledge across validator orchestration, promotion mechanics, and cross-domain runtime contracts. It connects platform law to workspace, A2C, DeepMine, Symphony, and N-Infinity so downstream systems inherit a calmer and more governable substrate. The capsule matters because second-brain behavior depends on the platform beneath it being deliberate rather than folkloric. It treats CapsuleOS as the coordinating program for trustworthy memory, not just a label for isolated capsules.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Removed meta-language so CapsuleOS Project states platform doctrine directly.
